detaileddescription.para: Default maximum incoming TCP connections, including realtime network & bootstrap
By default, allow bursts of 15MB/s (not sustainable)

memberdef.argsstring: (std::string const &, std::vector< std::pair< std::string, uint16_t > > &) const
memberdef.name: deserialize_address

detaileddescription.para: Entry is ignored if it cannot be parsed as a valid address:port
